label: Monolith level
description: Defines a progression level for the void monolith Anomaly structure, controlling its appearance, threat behavior, study requirements, and the letter/gizmo text shown to the player at that stage.

level.label: Level
level.description: Progression index for this monolith level. 0 = Inactive, increasing values represent greater awakening.

graphicIndex.label: Graphic index
graphicIndex.description: Selects the monolith body graphic variant rendered at this level.

monolithGlows.label: Monolith glows
monolithGlows.description: Whether the monolith emits ambient light at this level.

anomalyThreatTier.label: Anomaly threat tier
anomalyThreatTier.description: Anomaly threat intensity tier used by the storyteller at this level. 0 = inactive, 1 = stirring, 2 = active.

useInactiveAnomalyThreatFraction.label: Use inactive anomaly threat fraction
useInactiveAnomalyThreatFraction.description: If true, use the storyteller's inactive anomaly threat fraction setting as the base fraction at this level.

useActiveAnomalyThreatFraction.label: Use active anomaly threat fraction
useActiveAnomalyThreatFraction.description: If true, use the storyteller's active anomaly threat fraction setting as the base fraction at this level.

anomalyThreatFractionFactor.label: Anomaly threat fraction factor
anomalyThreatFractionFactor.description: Multiplier applied on top of the selected base threat fraction.

anomalyThreatFraction.label: Anomaly threat fraction
anomalyThreatFraction.description: Direct threat fraction override used only when neither inactive nor active fraction flags are set.

incidentsOnReached.label: Incidents on reached
incidentsOnReached.description: IncidentDefs that fire immediately when the monolith reaches this level.

triggersGrayPall.label: Triggers gray pall
triggersGrayPall.description: If true, reaching this level triggers the Gray Pall game condition.

unreachableDuringConditions.label: Unreachable during conditions
unreachableDuringConditions.description: GameConditionDefs that must be absent for the monolith to advance to this level.

advanceThroughActivation.label: Advance through activation
advanceThroughActivation.description: If true, the player can manually send a pawn to activate the monolith and advance past this level.

desiredHarbingerTreeCount.label: Desired harbinger tree count
desiredHarbingerTreeCount.description: Target number of harbinger trees the game will attempt to maintain while the monolith is at this level.

postEndgame.label: Post endgame
postEndgame.description: If true, this level represents a post-endgame state after the main monolith quest resolves.

monolithGlowRadiusOverride.label: Monolith glow radius override
monolithGlowRadiusOverride.description: Overrides the default glow light radius. -1 means use the default radius.

monolithStudyCategory.label: Monolith study category
monolithStudyCategory.description: KnowledgeCategoryDef that the player studies by interacting with the monolith at this level.

entityCatagoryCompletionRequired.label: Entity category completion required
entityCatagoryCompletionRequired.description: EntityCategoryDef whose discovered entity count must reach entityCountCompletionRequired before the monolith can advance. Note: game reports a config error if this is set but entityCountCompletionRequired is 0.

entityCountCompletionRequired.label: Entity count completion required
entityCountCompletionRequired.description: Number of entities in the entityCatagoryCompletionRequired category that must be discovered to allow the monolith to advance. Must be greater than 0 if entityCatagoryCompletionRequired is set.

anomalyMentalBreakChance.label: Anomaly mental break chance
anomalyMentalBreakChance.description: Per-interval chance that a colonist near the monolith suffers an anomaly-triggered mental break while the monolith is at this level.

activateSound.label: Activate sound
activateSound.description: SoundDef played when the player initiates monolith activation at this level.

activatedSound.label: Activated sound
activatedSound.description: SoundDef played when monolith activation completes and the level advances.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.description: Decorative or structural objects attached to the monolith graphic at this level, each with a ThingDef, graphic index, and grid offset.

sizeIncludingAttachments.label: Size including attachments
sizeIncludingAttachments.description: Total footprint of the monolith plus its attachments as (x, y) cell dimensions. When absent, the game derives the footprint from the monolith body size alone.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Asset path for the icon shown in the monolith level progress UI.

monolithLabel.label: Monolith label
monolithLabel.description: Display label for the monolith building when it is at this level.

monolithDescription.label: Monolith description
monolithDescription.description: Description shown for the monolith at this level (used by the disrupted endgame level in shipped data).

levelInspectText.label: Level inspect text
levelInspectText.description: Short string shown in the monolith building inspection panel at this level.

extraQuestDescription.label: Extra quest description
extraQuestDescription.description: Additional paragraph appended to the monolith quest description at this level.

activateGizmoText.label: Activate gizmo text
activateGizmoText.description: Short verb label displayed on the activation gizmo button.

activateFloatMenuText.label: Activate float menu text
activateFloatMenuText.description: Right-click float menu option text. May use {0} as a placeholder for the monolith label.

activateGizmoDescription.label: Activate gizmo description
activateGizmoDescription.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the activation gizmo.

pawnSentToActivateMessage.label: Pawn sent to activate message
pawnSentToActivateMessage.description: Message letter sent when a pawn is assigned to activate the monolith. May use {PAWN_nameDef} for the assigned pawn's name.

monolithCanBeActivatedText.label: Monolith can be activated text
monolithCanBeActivatedText.description: Compact text shown in the UI when the player is now able to activate this level.

activateQuestText.label: Activate quest text
activateQuestText.description: Quest step objective text for the monolith activation task.

activatableLetterLabel.label: Activatable letter label
activatableLetterLabel.description: Title of the letter sent to announce that this level can now be activated.

activatableLetterText.label: Activatable letter text
activatableLetterText.description: Body text of the letter sent to announce that this level can now be activated.

activatedLetterText.label: Activated letter text
activatedLetterText.description: Body text of the letter sent after the pawn completes activation. May use {PAWN_nameDef} and {PAWN_pronoun}.

new-inactive-level.label: New inactive level
new-inactive-level.description: A monolith level in the investigation phase where the player researches entities rather than manually activating.

new-active-level.label: New active level
new-active-level.description: A monolith level where the player can actively study the monolith and send a pawn to activate.
